lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਛੂਟੈ ਮਹਾ ਜਾਲ ਤੇ ਜਿਸੁ ਗੁਰਸਬਦੁ ਨਿਰੰਤਰਿ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: so chhoottai mahaa jaal te jis gurasabad nirantar |2|
lines.english: They escape from the great noose of death; they are permeated with the Word of the Guru's Shabad. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੀ ਮਹਿਮਾ ਕਿਆ ਕਹਾ ਗੁਰੁ ਬਿਬੇਕ ਸਤ ਸਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: gur kee mahimaa kiaa kahaa gur bibek sat sar |
lines.english: How can I chant the Glorious Praises of the Guru? The Guru is the ocean of Truth and clear understanding.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਵਹੁ ਸਦ ਸਦਾ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਮਨੁ ਰੰਗੇ ॥
lines.translit: naam dhiaavahu sad sadaa har har man range |
lines.english: Meditating on the Naam, the Name of the Lord, forever and ever, my mind is filled with the Love of the Lord, Har, Har.

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਹੁ ਆਦਿ ਜੁਗਾਦੀ ਜੁਗਹ ਜੁਗੁ ਪੂਰਾ ਪਰਮੇਸਰੁ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: ohu aad jugaadee jugah jug pooraa paramesar |3|
lines.english: He is the Perfect Transcendent Lord, from the very beginning, and throughout the ages. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਈ ਅਲਖੁ ਅਪਾਰੁ ਭੋਰੀ ਮਨਿ ਵਸੈ ॥
lines.translit: saaee alakh apaar bhoree man vasai |
lines.english: If the Invisible and Infinite Lord dwells within my mind, even for a moment,

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਉ ਪ੍ਰਾਣ ਧਨੁ ਗੁਰੂ ਹੈ ਨਾਨਕ ਕੈ ਸੰਗੇ ॥੪॥੨॥੧੦੪॥
lines.translit: jeeo praan dhan guroo hai naanak kai sange |4|2|104|
lines.english: The Guru is my soul, my breath of life, and wealth; O Nanak, He is with me forever. ||4||2||104||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਸਾ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: aasaa mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Aasaa, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਵੰਞਾ ਕੁਰਬਾਣੁ ਸਾਈ ਆਪਣੇ ॥
lines.translit: hau vanyaa kurabaan saaee aapane |
lines.english: I am a sacrifice to my Lord Master.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੋਵੈ ਅਨਦੁ ਘਣਾ ਮਨਿ ਤਨਿ ਜਾਪਣੇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: hovai anad ghanaa man tan jaapane |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Meditating on Him, a great joy wells up within my mind and body. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੂਖੁ ਦਰਦੁ ਰੋਗੁ ਮਾਇ ਮੈਡਾ ਹਭੁ ਨਸੈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: dookh darad rog maae maiddaa habh nasai |1|
lines.english: then all my pains, troubles, and diseases vanish. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿੰਦਕ ਗਾਲੑਿ ਸੁਣੀ ਸਚੇ ਤਿਸੁ ਧਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: bindak gaala sunee sache tis dhanee |
lines.english: I have heard only a little bit of news about the True Lord Master.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੂਖੀ ਹੂੰ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਇ ਮਾਇ ਨ ਕੀਮ ਗਣੀ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: sookhee hoon sukh paae maae na keem ganee |2|
lines.english: I have obtained the peace of all peace, O my mother; I cannot estimate its worth. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੈ ਨਿਰਗੁਣਿ ਮੇਰੀ ਮਾਇ ਆਪਿ ਲੜਿ ਲਾਇ ਲਈ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: mai niragun meree maae aap larr laae lee |3|
lines.english: I am worthless, O my mother; He Himself has attached me to the hem of His robe. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨੈਣ ਪਸੰਦੋ ਸੋਇ ਪੇਖਿ ਮੁਸਤਾਕ ਭਈ ॥
lines.translit: nain pasando soe pekh musataak bhee |
lines.english: He is so beautiful to my eyes; beholding Him, I have been bewitched.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਕਾ ਪਾਤਿਸਾਹੁ ਦਿਸੈ ਜਾਹਰਾ ॥੪॥੩॥੧੦੫॥
lines.translit: naanak kaa paatisaahu disai jaaharaa |4|3|105|
lines.english: The Supreme King of Nanak is immanent and manifest. ||4||3||105||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬੇਦ ਕਤੇਬ ਸੰਸਾਰ ਹਭਾ ਹੂੰ ਬਾਹਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: bed kateb sansaar habhaa hoon baaharaa |
lines.english: He is beyond the world of the Vedas, the Koran and the Bible.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਵਨ ਜੁਗਤਿ ਮੇਲਾਵਉ ਨਿਰਗੁਣ ਬਿਖਈ ਜੀਉ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: kavan jugat melaavau niragun bikhee jeeo |1|
lines.english: How shall You unite me, the worthless and corrupt soul, with Yourself. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਸਾ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: aasaa mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Aasaa, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਾਖ ਭਗਤ ਆਰਾਧਹਿ ਜਪਤੇ ਪੀਉ ਪੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: laakh bhagat aaraadheh japate peeo peeo |
lines.english: Tens of thousands of devotees worship and adore You, chanting, "Beloved, Beloved."

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੇਰੀ ਟੇਕ ਗੋਵਿੰਦ ਗੁਪਾਲ ਦਇਆਲ ਪ੍ਰਭ ॥
lines.translit: teree ttek govind gupaal deaal prabh |
lines.english: You are my Support, O Merciful God, Lord of the Universe, Sustainer of the World.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂੰ ਸਭਨਾ ਕੇ ਨਾਥ ਤੇਰੀ ਸ੍ਰਿਸਟਿ ਸਭ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: toon sabhanaa ke naath teree srisatt sabh |1| rahaau |
lines.english: You are the Master of all; the entire creation is Yours. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਦਾ ਸਹਾਈ ਸੰਤ ਪੇਖਹਿ ਸਦਾ ਹਜੂਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: sadaa sahaaee sant pekheh sadaa hajoor |
lines.english: You are the constant help and support of the Saints, who behold You Ever-present.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮ ਬਿਹੂਨੜਿਆ ਸੇ ਮਰਨੑਿ ਵਿਸੂਰਿ ਵਿਸੂਰਿ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naam bihoonarriaa se marana visoor visoor |2|
lines.english: Those who lack the Naam, the Name of the Lord, shall die, engulfed in sorrow and pain. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਾਸ ਦਾਸਤਣ ਭਾਇ ਮਿਟਿਆ ਤਿਨਾ ਗਉਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: daas daasatan bhaae mittiaa tinaa gaun |
lines.english: Those servants, who lovingly perform the Lord's service, are freed from the cycle of reincarnation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਿਸਰਿਆ ਜਿਨੑਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਤਿਨਾੜਾ ਹਾਲੁ ਕਉਣੁ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: visariaa jinaa naam tinaarraa haal kaun |3|
lines.english: What shall be the fate of those who forget the Naam? ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੈਸੇ ਪਸੁ ਹਰੑਿਆਉ ਤੈਸਾ ਸੰਸਾਰੁ ਸਭ ॥
lines.translit: jaise pas haraiaau taisaa sansaar sabh |
lines.english: As are the cattle which have strayed, so is the entire world.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਬੰਧਨ ਕਾਟਿ ਮਿਲਾਵਹੁ ਆਪਿ ਪ੍ਰਭ ॥੪॥੪॥੧੦੬॥
lines.translit: naanak bandhan kaatt milaavahu aap prabh |4|4|106|
lines.english: O God, please cut away Nanak's bonds, and unite him with Yourself. ||4||4||106||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਭੇ ਥੋਕ ਵਿਸਾਰਿ ਹਿਕੋ ਖਿਆਲੁ ਕਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: habhe thok visaar hiko khiaal kar |
lines.english: Forget all other things, and dwell upon the Lord alone.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਸਾ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: aasaa mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Aasaa, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਠ ਪਹਰ ਸਾਲਾਹਿ ਸਿਰਜਨਹਾਰ ਤੂੰ ॥
lines.translit: aatth pehar saalaeh sirajanahaar toon |
lines.english: Twenty-four hours a day, praise the Creator Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਝੂਠਾ ਲਾਹਿ ਗੁਮਾਨੁ ਮਨੁ ਤਨੁ ਅਰਪਿ ਧਰਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jhootthaa laeh gumaan man tan arap dhar |1|
lines.english: Lay aside your false pride, and dedicate your mind and body to Him. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋਈ ਕੰਮੁ ਕਮਾਇ ਜਿਤੁ ਮੁਖੁ ਉਜਲਾ ॥
lines.translit: soee kam kamaae jit mukh ujalaa |
lines.english: So, do that work, by which your face shall be made radiant.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਵਾਂ ਤੇਰੀ ਦਾਤਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਕਰਹੁ ਮੂੰ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jeevaan teree daat kirapaa karahu moon |1| rahaau |
lines.english: I live by Your bountiful gifts - please, shower me with Your Mercy! ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋਈ ਲਗੈ ਸਚਿ ਜਿਸੁ ਤੂੰ ਦੇਹਿ ਅਲਾ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: soee lagai sach jis toon dehi alaa |2|
lines.english: He alone becomes attached to the Truth, O Lord, unto whom You give it. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਨ ਢਹੰਦੋ ਮੂਲਿ ਸੋ ਘਰੁ ਰਾਸਿ ਕਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: jo na dtahando mool so ghar raas kar |
lines.english: So build and adorn that house, which shall never be destroyed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਿਕੋ ਚਿਤਿ ਵਸਾਇ ਕਦੇ ਨ ਜਾਇ ਮਰਿ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: hiko chit vasaae kade na jaae mar |3|
lines.english: Enshrine the One Lord within your consciousness; He shall never die. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਨੑਾ ਪਿਆਰਾ ਰਾਮੁ ਜੋ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਭਾਣਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: tinaa piaaraa raam jo prabh bhaaniaa |
lines.english: The Lord is dear to those, who are pleasing to the Will of God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪਰਸਾਦਿ ਅਕਥੁ ਨਾਨਕਿ ਵਖਾਣਿਆ ॥੪॥੫॥੧੦੭॥
lines.translit: gur parasaad akath naanak vakhaaniaa |4|5|107|
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, Nanak describes the indescribable. ||4||5||107||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨੑਾ ਨ ਵਿਸਰੈ ਨਾਮੁ ਸੇ ਕਿਨੇਹਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: jinaa na visarai naam se kinehiaa |
lines.english: What are they like - those who do not forget the Naam, the Name of the Lord?

lines.gurmukhi: ਭੇਦੁ ਨ ਜਾਣਹੁ ਮੂਲਿ ਸਾਂਈ ਜੇਹਿਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: bhed na jaanahu mool saanee jehiaa |1|
lines.english: Know that there is absolutely no difference; they are exactly like the Lord. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਸਾ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: aasaa mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Aasaa, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨੁ ਤਨੁ ਹੋਇ ਨਿਹਾਲੁ ਤੁਮੑ ਸੰਗਿ ਭੇਟਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: man tan hoe nihaal tuma sang bhettiaa |
lines.english: The mind and body are enraptured, meeting with You, O Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਜਨ ਪਰਸਾਦਿ ਦੁਖੁ ਸਭੁ ਮੇਟਿਆ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: sukh paaeaa jan parasaad dukh sabh mettiaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Peace is obtained, by the favor of the Lord's humble servant; all pains are taken away. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇਤੇ ਖੰਡ ਬ੍ਰਹਮੰਡ ਉਧਾਰੇ ਤਿੰਨੑ ਖੇ ॥
lines.translit: jete khandd brahamandd udhaare tina khe |
lines.english: As many as are the continents of the world, so many have been saved.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨੑ ਮਨਿ ਵੁਠਾ ਆਪਿ ਪੂਰੇ ਭਗਤ ਸੇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jina man vutthaa aap poore bhagat se |2|
lines.english: Those, in whose minds You Yourself dwell, O Lord, are the perfect devotees. ||2||
